description: Branch protection lookup 404 or 403 is a suppression, not an outright failure.
skill_rules_that_must_fire: If branch protection query fails (404/403), record in Uncovered Risk List and continue.
likely: one non-blocking gate could not run, with explicit follow-up owner.
Suppress a gate only when: (1) gate is N/A for changed files, (2) tooling unavailable, or (3) equivalent upstream check proves the condition
